oss_landing.hero_sub: Route, authenticate, and track AI API usage across Anthropic, OpenAI, and local models. Self-host in 30 seconds.
oss_landing.features_sub: Everything you need to manage AI API usage across your team.
oss_landing.feature_multiprovider_desc: Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama behind a single API. Automatic format translation between providers.
oss_landing.feature_routing_desc: Pass "model": "auto" and let Snodus pick Haiku, Sonnet, or Opus based on input complexity.
oss_landing.feature_keys_desc: Per-user keys with rate limiting, monthly budgets, rotation, and instant revocation.
oss_landing.feature_spend_desc: Real-time cost tracking per model, user, and team. Dashboard with recent requests and breakdowns.
oss_landing.feature_budget_desc: Set monthly caps per key or team. Gateway returns 402 when the budget is exceeded.
oss_landing.feature_cli_desc: Manage teams, users, keys, budgets, and providers from the command line.
oss_landing.compare_sub: The core gateway is free. The managed service adds enterprise features.
oss_landing.footer_company: Snodus is an open source project by 42NE Ltd, London.

errors.rate_limited: Rate limit exceeded. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
errors.budget_exceeded: Budget exceeded. Upgrade your plan to continue.
errors.key_missing: Missing API key. Use Authorization: Bearer sk-xxx
errors.key_expired: API key expired. Use your rotated key.
errors.plan_limit: Plan limit reached. Upgrade to add more.
errors.token_limit_reached: Monthly token limit reached. Upgrade your plan or wait for next month reset.
